title: Converting SQL Server code to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini as an AI tutor to convert SQL Server T-SQL code to PostgreSQL. The tool explains data type mappings like IDENTITY and BIT to their PostgreSQL equivalents, helping developers learn database migration and PostgreSQL skills.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates using Gemini as an AI tutor to convert SQL Server T-SQL code into PostgreSQL. The walkthrough covers data type mappings, including how IDENTITY and BIT translate to their PostgreSQL equivalents. The framing is instructional: the goal is building database migration and PostgreSQL skills rather than only producing converted code.
